---
name: Working Style
description: Keep edits surgical, maintain quality, and avoid unnecessary churn.
applyTo: "**"
---
# Working style

- Prefer small, direct changes.
- The best changes are often the smallest correct changes.
- Keep edits surgical after context is gathered.
- Verify the changed path, not the whole world.
- Do not add backward-compatibility code unless there is a concrete need.
- Do not write durable memory for every task; store only high-signal items.
- When services, ports, wrappers, or MCP topology change, update docs immediately.
- For review tasks, prioritize findings, risks, regressions, and missing tests over summaries.
